Life in Albania is one of Europe's greatest untold stories, and in this Albania documentary, Amazing Global Discoveries takes you deep inside the country the world overlooked for decades. Once called the North Korea of Europe, Albania today is a land of stunning beaches, ancient mountain villages, and some of the most beautiful women on the continent.

From the turquoise waters of Ksamil to the dramatic peaks of the Accursed Mountains, from UNESCO cities like Berat and Gjirokaster to the world's best ranked dish tave kosi, this is real life in Albania like you have never seen it before.
